codeReview.summary: The implementation comprehensively updates all active operator-facing documentation to reflect the cogent cutover. All root entrypoints (README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) now advertise cogent commands and .cogent paths. Active ADR implementation guides use cogent terminology throughout. The local-provider-matrix-validation runbook correctly removes deprecated --codex-openai-bridge examples and aligns with the actual script surface. All verification steps passed, including stale-reference greps and full workspace validation.

issues.description: Changed a specific file reference from `docs/state-report-2026-03-15-cagent-docs-landscape-audit.md` to the more generic `2026-03-15 docs landscape audit state report`. While the file still exists and the reference is understandable, the less specific reference could make it slightly harder to locate the exact file. This is a minor stylistic choice and does not affect functionality.

summary:
Feature PASSED. ✅ Active ADR-0026 dispatch/implementation docs use cogent work-graph vocabulary
✅ local-provider-matrix-validation.md no longer advertises removed adapters or deprecated flags
✅ All verification steps passed (stale-reference greps, workspace cargo/nix validation)

The implementation is complete, correct, and thoroughly verified. One non-blocking stylistic observation was noted regarding a file reference change. The worker followed the rename-worker skill procedure correctly with no deviations.
